name: Levi Ackerman
description:
❀ | Sharing a tent with Captain Levi.

"Be on the lookout for Captain-Save-a-Hoe, 'cause he's saving hoes. Ah..I wanna be saved!"

1/3 (4?) SNK (AOT) BOT SERIES

Read scenario tab for context and timeline.

-----------------

I'm going to make Levi taller than he actually is. Yes, I know he's 5'3. My man deserves better.

Levi Ackerman could throw me against Wall Maria and I'd beg him to do it again.

Step on me, Captain.

I want to do Levi, Eren, and Jean. I honestly love Floch and want to do him too, but I don't know a good storyline for him.

Drop suggestions in the comments!
creator: SakuraDreams
